tools.name: jq
tools.whenToUse: User wants to extract, filter, or reshape JSON data

tools.name: yq
tools.whenToUse: User wants to extract or edit YAML, TOML, or XML data

tools.name: phone_call
tools.shortDescription: Place a real phone call through the Jarvis phone service (requires both Jarvis secrets)
tools.whenToUse: User asks Bob to place a phone call and provides a destination plus a purpose; omit persona to call as bob by default
tools.example: phone_call(to: 'Glennel', purpose: 'The pickup is at 5', max_minutes: 10)

tools.name: phone_hangup
tools.shortDescription: End an active Jarvis phone call
tools.whenToUse: User asks Bob to hang up an active call by call id

tools.name: phone_status
tools.shortDescription: Check the current status of a Jarvis phone call
tools.whenToUse: User asks for the current state of a call by call id

tools.name: mlr
tools.whenToUse: User wants to filter, join, reshape, or aggregate tabular data
tools.example: mlr --csv filter '$age > 30' then stats1 -a mean,sum -f salary data.csv

tools.name: rg
tools.whenToUse: User says 'find X in files', 'search for', or 'grep'

tools.name: fd
tools.whenToUse: User wants to locate files by name or glob

tools.name: bat
tools.shortDescription: Cat with syntax highlighting and line numbers
tools.whenToUse: User wants to view a source file nicely; prefer read_file for agent use

tools.name: tree
tools.whenToUse: User wants a visual layout of a folder hierarchy

tools.name: age
tools.whenToUse: User wants to encrypt a file with a passphrase or recipient key

tools.name: pdftotext
tools.shortDescription: Extract plain text from a PDF
tools.whenToUse: User wants the text contents of a PDF for reading or grepping

tools.name: pdfinfo
tools.shortDescription: Print PDF metadata (pages, size, title, etc.)
tools.whenToUse: User asks how many pages, when a PDF was created, or who authored it

tools.name: qpdf
tools.whenToUse: User wants to split, merge, or unlock a PDF

tools.name: tesseract
tools.whenToUse: User wants to read text out of a PNG/JPG/scanned document

tools.name: pandoc
tools.shortDescription: Convert between document formats (md, docx, html, pdf, ...)
tools.whenToUse: User wants to convert a document from one format to another

tools.name: ffmpeg
tools.whenToUse: User wants to convert, trim, extract audio, or re-encode media

tools.name: yt-dlp
tools.shortDescription: Download audio/video from YouTube and 1000+ sites
tools.whenToUse: User says 'download', 'get', 'save', or 'rip' a video/audio from a URL

tools.name: whisper-cpp
tools.whenToUse: User wants to transcribe a local audio file without uploading to a cloud service

tools.name: exiftool
tools.shortDescription: Read and write file metadata (EXIF, IPTC, XMP)
tools.whenToUse: User wants to inspect or strip photo/document metadata

tools.name: zbarimg
tools.shortDescription: Decode QR codes and barcodes from images
tools.whenToUse: User wants to read a QR or barcode out of an image file

tools.name: qrencode
tools.whenToUse: User wants to create a QR code from text or a URL

tools.name: nmap
tools.whenToUse: User explicitly asks to scan a host for open ports or services in a CTF/lab context

tools.name: httpx
tools.whenToUse: User wants to fingerprint web servers on a list of hosts in a CTF/lab context

tools.name: ffuf
tools.shortDescription: Fast web fuzzer for directory/parameter discovery (CTF)
tools.whenToUse: User wants to brute-force paths or parameters on a CTF web target

tools.name: feroxbuster
tools.shortDescription: Recursive content discovery (CTF alternative to ffuf)
tools.whenToUse: User wants recursive directory brute-forcing on a CTF web target
